name: liam-git-workflow
description: Personal Git workflow plugin for Codex with a shared cross-runtime package for Codex skills, Claude commands, install, and update flows.

interface.shortDescription: Personal Git workflow commands for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Liam Git Workflow to create branches, draft Chinese Conventional Commits, sync branches, finish work, handle hotfixes, prepare releases, and audit Git policy alignment from one consistent Codex plugin package.
